zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Hartshorn於1652年7月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁時，他的父親Thomas Hartshorne38歲，母親Susanna Buck30歲。他於大約1676年與Sarah Burt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1727年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可沃波爾享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Hartshorn于1652年7月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁时，他的父亲Thomas Hartshorne38岁，母亲Susanna Buck30岁。他于大约1676年与Sarah Burt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1727年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可沃波爾享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克費利浦德瑟特 本 曼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Hartshorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hartshorne (Derbyshire), from Old English heort ‘hart, stag’ (genitive heortes) + horn ‘horn’, perhaps in reference to the nearby hill (known as Hart Hill) and its supposed resemblance to a hart's horn. Alternatively, the name may be topographic, from Middle English harteshorn ‘swine cress’, for someone who lived at or near an area where swine cress grew.

variants.name: Hartshorne
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): variant of   Hartshorn  .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1700: Massachusetts, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Hartshorn was born on 2 July 1652, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Hartshorne, was 38 and his mother, Susanna Buck, was 30. He married Sarah Burt about 1676, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 30 July 1727, in Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joseph Hartshorn est né le 2 juillet 1652, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Hartshorne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Susanna Buck, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Burt environ 1676, à Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1727, à Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joseph Hartshorn am 2. Juli 1652 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hartshorne 38 und seine Mutter Susanna Buck 30. Er hat um 1676 in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Burt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1727 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Hartshorn è nato il il 2 luglio 1652 nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Hartshorne, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Buck, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Burt circa 1676, nel Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1727, nel Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクデドハム

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Hartshornが1652年7月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングで生まれた時，父Thomas Hartshorneは38歳，母Susanna Buckは30歳であった。約1676年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスレアディングでSarah Burtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1727年7月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクワルポルで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークフレエプオルトデセルト オフ メインにて埋葬された。

ko.Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩
ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함

ko.Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩

ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함
ko.Dedham, Norfolk, Massacusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다 웨스트 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Hartshorn(이)가 1652년 7월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hartshorne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Buck(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1676년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 Sarah Burt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1727년 7월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 월포일에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 프리프르트 데세르트 프 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Hartshorn nasceu em 2 de julho de 1652, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Hartshorne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Buck, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Burt aproximadamente 1676, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1727, em Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Hartshorn родился 2 июля 1652 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Hartshorne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Buck, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Burt около 1676 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 30 июля 1727 г. в местности валпол, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности десирт оф меин, фрипорт, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Hartshorn nació el 2 de julio de 1652, en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Hartshorne, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Susanna Buck, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sarah Burt aproximadamente 1676, en Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1727, en Walpole, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Desert Of Maine, Freeport, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
